Hero.title: Nova Paw Festival
Hero.subtitle: International Pet Festival, First Time in Qatar
Hero.description: Judged by WKU World Kennel Union & WCF World Cat Federation international judges. The world comes to Qatar, and your pet takes center stage.
Hero.video_badge_bottom: Experience the largest pet gathering in Qatar.

AboutGrid.title: Where Paws Meet Celebration
AboutGrid.story: The {bold_nova} is Qatar's first international pet festival, bringing together families and animal enthusiasts from around the world for an unforgettable two-day celebration at The Pearl Island. Featuring {bold_wku} and {bold_wcf} international judges, this landmark event sets a new global standard.

hero.title: About the Festival
hero.desc: Qatar's first international pet festival   two days of world-class competitions, entertainment, and family fun. Experience a complete pet ecosystem featuring {nova_vet}, {adoption_zones}, and a curated selection of {food_trucks} at The Pearl Island.

story.title: Groundbreaking Debut in Qatar
story.p1: The Nova Paw Festival is a groundbreaking international pet event making its debut in Qatar on {date} at the stunning The Pearl Island, Qatar.
story.p2: This festival brings together pet lovers, families, breeders, and animal enthusiasts from across the globe for an unforgettable celebration of our furry companions.
story.quote: What sets Nova Paw apart is its international judging panel    {wku} judge all dog competitions, while {wcf} evaluate the cat shows.
story.p3: The festival spans a 270-meter venue divided into three main zones: the Dog Space, the Cat Space, and the Carnival Zone    each offering unique experiences, competitions, and activities.
story.p4: From the 18m × 14m Dog Arena hosting WDF/WKU-sanctioned shows to the 10m geodesic Cat Dome with immersive 180° projection, every space is designed for maximum engagement and comfort.

zones.title:
Explore the
Festival Zones
zones.desc: Discover 9 specialized zones at The Pearl Island, each designed for maximum engagement, safety, and fun.

dog.title: Dog Arena
items: Safe and exciting experiences for dogs

adoption.title: Adoption Zone
items: Connecting visitors with animals in need

market.title: Pet Market
items: Pet accessories, lifestyle products, and treats

food.title: Food Trucks
items: Variety of food and beverage experiences
Relax, dine, and enjoy the festival vibes

photo.title: Photo Zone
items: Meet mascots and capture themed moments
Designed for social sharing and memories

events.title: Gates Open & Welcome
events.desc: Festival opens    collect your passport and giveaway bag at the entrance.

events.title: Opening Ceremony
events.desc: Grand opening on the Main Stage with mascot reveal and sponsor introductions.

events.title: Best Dog Show    Round 1
events.desc: WKU international judges evaluate Puppy and Youth classes in the Dog Arena.

events.title: Cat Drawing Battle    Session 1
events.desc: Live creative battle in the Cat Dome    artists compete in real-time.

events.title: Dog Fashion Show
events.desc: Owners and dogs strut the runway in matching themed outfits.

events.title: Lunch Break & Food Trucks
events.desc: Enjoy cuisine from 6 food trucks across both zones.

events.title: Grooming Competition
events.desc: Professional groomers showcase precision trimming and styling.

events.title: Best Cat Show    Round 1
events.desc: WCF international judges evaluate cats inside the Cat Dome.

events.title: Painting Competition
events.desc: Live painting session with artworks projected across the Cat Dome walls.

events.title: Carnival Games & Activities
events.desc: Fetch & Win, Spin-A-Treat, Paw Shot Challenge, and more.

events.title: Day 1 Awards Ceremony
events.desc: Champion cups, medals, and certificates presented on the Main Stage.

events.title: Gates Open
events.desc: Second day kicks off with new competitions and activities.

events.title: Best Dog Show    Round 2
events.desc: Adult class judging and Best in Show finale by WKU judges.

events.title: Cat Drawing Battle    Session 2
events.desc: Second round of the live creative drawing battle.

events.title: Best Cat Show    Round 2
events.desc: WCF judges select the Best Cat of Show.

events.title: Lunch Break & Food Trucks
events.desc: Enjoy cuisine from 6 food trucks across both zones.

events.title: Dog Fashion Show    Day 2
events.desc: New contestants take the runway with their dogs.

events.title: Grooming Competition    Day 2
events.desc: Second round of professional grooming artistry.

events.title: Painting Competition    Day 2
events.desc: New artists create live works in the Cat Dome.

events.title: Adoption & Vet Zone
events.desc: Final chance to visit QAWS, Paws Rescue, and NovaVet booths.

events.title: Grand Closing Ceremony
events.desc: Final awards, Best in Show, Best Cat of Show, and closing celebration.

GalleryPage.title:
Explore the
Festival Magic
GalleryPage.desc: A glimpse into the incredible spaces and experiences awaiting you at Nova Paw Festival 2026.
GalleryPage.social_desc: Tag your photos with {hashtag} and follow us for updates!

dog-arena.title: Dog Arena
dog-arena.desc: WDF shows, races, and K9 demonstrations with professional ring setup.

cat-dome.title: Cat Dome
cat-dome.desc: 10m geodesic dome with 180° projection and grooming shows.

main-stage.title: Main Stage
main-stage.desc: 6m × 4m stage with 5m LED screen and runway ramp.

photo-zone.title: Photo Zone
photo-zone.desc: 3D letter installation and mascot photo booths.

dog.title: Dog Space
dog.desc: Main stage, dog arena, vet booth, adoption area, sponsor booths, and food trucks.

cat.title: Cat Space
cat.desc: Cat Dome with projection shows, grooming zone, fashion runway, and cat statue landmark.

carnival.title: Carnival Zone
carnival.desc: Fetch & Win, Spin-A-Treat, Smash-A-Cat, Pawspin Ruffle, and the Paw Shot Challenge.

food.title: Food Trucks
food.desc: 6 food trucks: Baker St, Karak Signature, Amora Pizza, Seven Lives, Burgeri, Pasta To Go.

vet.title: Vet & Adoption
vet.desc: NovaVet free consultations, QAWS dog adoption, Paws Rescue cat adoption, and pharmacy booth.

landmarks.title: Landmarks
landmarks.desc: 10m helium paw balloon, 3.5m dog & cat statues, 3D letter installation, and mascot walkabouts.

Competitions.title:
International
Competitions
Competitions.desc: Judged by WKU & WCF international judges. Compete for championship titles, cups, and medals in Qatar's premier pet event.

items.title: Dog Fashion Show
items.desc: Owners and dogs strut the runway in matching themed outfits judged on creativity, coordination, and charm.

items.title: Grooming Competition
items.desc: Professional groomers showcase their artistry precision trimming, styling, and finishing under WKU supervision.

items.title: Best Dog Show
items.desc: The prestigious WKU-recognized event evaluating breed structure, temperament, and presentation across three classes.

items.title: Best Cat Show
items.desc: WCF-licensed grand judging of elegance, breed standards, and feline grace inside the immersive Cat Dome.

items.title: Cat Drawing Battle
items.desc: A live creative battle where artists compete to draw cats in real-time speed, style, and imagination under the spotlight.

items.title: Painting Competition
items.desc: Live painting session where artists create cat and dog inspired works projected across the Cat Dome walls.

hero.title: Join or Participate Now in One of the 5 International Competitions
hero.desc: Judged by {wku} & {wcf} international judges  register your pet or yourself and compete for champion cups, medals, and certificates.

cta.title: Ready to Take the Spotlight?
cta.subtitle: Register your pet for one of our international competitions and compete for championship titles, cups, and medals.
cta.warning: Participation requires a Pet Owner Ticket

fashion.title: Dog Fashion Show
fashion.desc: Owners and dogs strut the runway in matching themed outfits. Judged on creativity, coordination, fit, presentation, and overall charm by WKU international judges.

grooming.title: Grooming Competition
grooming.desc: Professional groomers showcase precision trimming, styling, and finishing under live judging by WKU officials. Evaluated on technique, cleanliness, creativity, handling, and final appearance.

dog_show.title: Best Dog Show
dog_show.desc: The prestigious WKU-recognized event evaluating breed structure, temperament, and presentation across Puppy, Youth, and Adult classes in a double-ring setup.

cat_show.title: Best Cat Show
cat_show.desc: WCF-licensed grand judging inside the immersive Cat Dome. Cats evaluated on body type, head, ears, eyes, coat, and overall condition according to WCF international standards.

drawing.title: Cat Drawing Battle
drawing.desc: A live creative battle where artists compete to draw cats in real-time under the spotlight. Judged on speed, style, imagination, and artistic technique  the ultimate feline art showdown.

cups.title: Champion Cups
cups.desc: 16 Gold, 16 Silver, 16 Rose across all competitions and both days.

medals.title: Medals
medals.desc: Awarded for 4th and 5th place finishers in the Silver and Rose categories.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.desc: Official WKU/WCF certificates of participation for everyone who competes.

success.title: Registration Received
success.desc: Your application for the {event} has been submitted. Our international panel will review your details and contact you regarding final approval.

ContactPage.title:
Let's Connect
with Nova Paw
ContactPage.desc: Whether you're an attendee, a potential sponsor, or a member of the press, our team is ready to assist you.

form.title: Send us a Message
form.desc: Drop us a line and we'll get back to you shortly.

whatsapp.title: Need Immediate Help?
whatsapp.desc: Our support team is available via WhatsApp for quick questions regarding tickets and pet registrations.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Nova Paw Festival's website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

registration.title: 2. Pet Registration
registration.content: All pet registrations are subject to verification of health and vaccination records. Nova Paw reserves the right to refuse entry to any pet that does not meet our safety standards.

tickets.title: 3. Ticketing and Refunds
tickets.content: All ticket sales are final. Refunds are only issued in the event of festival cancellation by the organizers.

conduct.title: 4. Attendee Conduct
conduct.content: Visitors must follow all safety protocols and instructions from festival staff. Pets must be kept in designated areas at all times.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide during registration, including owner contact details and pet health records.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: Your information is used to process registrations, issue tickets, and ensure the safety of all participants.

security.title: 3. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal and pet information from unauthorized access.

hero.title: Nova Paw Blog
hero.desc: Stay updated with the latest pet care tips, festival news, and community stories. From preparation guides to heartwarming adoption success stories.

preparation.title: Preparing Your Pet for Festival Crowds
preparation.desc: Learn essential training tips to help your dog or cat stay calm and happy amidst the excitement of Nova Paw Festival.

hydration.title: The Importance of Pet Hydration in Qatar
hydration.desc: Keep your furry friends safe and hydrated during the festival with our guide to pet health in the Pearl's climate.

cat_dome.title: Inside the Cat Dome Experience
cat_dome.desc: A sneak peek into the immersive world of the Nova Paw Cat Dome, featuring interactive play zones and relaxation areas.

adoption.title: Adoption Stories: Finding Forever Homes
adoption.desc: Heartwarming success stories from previous local initiatives and what to expect at our festival's adoption center.

training.title: Best in Show: Training Your Champion
training.desc: Top tips from professional judges on how to prepare your dog for the prestigious international competitions at Pet's Park.

fashion.title: Festival Fashion: The Cutest Trends
fashion.desc: Explore the latest in pet accessories and fashion as we get ready for the Dog and Cat Fashion Shows.

hero.title:
Experience the
Magic of Pets
hero.desc: From prestigious international competitions to interactive workshops, discover the full lineup of events at Nova Paw Festival.

dog_show.title: Dog Best in Show
dog_show.desc: The ultimate competition featuring international WKU judges and Qatar's finest canines.

cat_show.title: Cat Best in Show
cat_show.desc: A prestigious WCF-sanctioned all-breed competition showcasing feline elegance and standard.

grooming.title: Master Grooming
grooming.desc: Live demonstrations and competitions featuring master groomers from around the world.

fashion.title: Pet Fashion Show
fashion.desc: Where style meets wag! A fun-filled showcase of the most fashionable pets in Qatar.

drawing.title: Cat Drawing Battle
drawing.desc: An interactive creative session where artists and pet lovers celebrate feline beauty.

agility.title: Agility Run
agility.desc: Watch pets navigate complex obstacle courses in a display of speed and intelligence.

SponsorshipPage.title:
Our Visionary
Festival Partners
SponsorshipPage.desc: Nova Paw Festival offers brands premium visibility and engagement with a highly targeted audience of pet owners and families.

form.title: Become a Partner
form.desc: Interested in showcasing your brand at Qatar's premier pet event? Join us as a sponsor and connect with thousands of pet lovers.
form.placeholder_message: Tell us about your brand and what kind of partnership you're looking for...
form.success_desc: Our partnership team has received your inquiry and will be in touch within 24-48 hours with our sponsorship prospectus.

hero.title:
The Experts Behind
Nova Paw
hero.desc: Meet the international judges, industry leaders, and passionate organizers dedicated to celebrating the world of pets in Qatar.

quote.text: Nova Paw Festival isn't just an event; it's a global celebration of the deep bond between humans and their animal companions. Our mission is to set new standards for pet events in the Middle East, one wag and one purr at a time.
quote.author: Ahmed Zulfikar

PetOwnerDashboard.security_note1: Pet passports must be valid for at least 6 months post-event.

health.title: Health Compliance
health.desc: Pet Passport and Vaccination Records are required for arena entry.

TicketsPage.hero_desc: Choose your tier and prepare for an unforgettable weekend at The Pearl Island. Limited early-bird slots available.

Venue.title: A World-Class Destination for Pets
Venue.desc: Set against the stunning waterfront of The Pearl Island, Qatar, the festival spans a 270-meter venue featuring the Dog Arena, the immersive Cat Dome, main stage, food trucks, adoption zones, and carnival areas   all designed for maximum fun and comfort for pets and families.

Gallery.desc: A glimpse into the incredible spaces and experiences awaiting you at Nova Paw Festival 2026.
Gallery.social_desc: Tag your photos with {hashtag} and follow us for updates!

CTABanner.subtitle: Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity to celebrate your pets, connect with fellow lovers, and experience the thrill of the festival!

Footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe for exclusive festival updates, competition results, and early-bird ticket access.

Metadata.title: Nova Paw Festival | Qatar's First Pet Festival
Metadata.description: A two-day celebration of dogs and cats featuring international shows, live entertainment, and family experiences.
